Config Module¶

Config file where project constants are stored.

class config.Color[source]¶

Color variant class.

BLACK = (0, 0, 0)¶
BLUE = (0, 0, 255)¶
GREEN = (0, 255, 0)¶
RED = (255, 0, 0)¶
WHITE = (255, 255, 255)¶
YELLOW = (255, 255, 0)¶
class config.Direction[source]¶

Define the direction.

DOWN = (0, 1)¶
DOWN_DEG = 270¶
LEFT = (-1, 0)¶
LEFT_DEG = 180¶
RIGHT = (1, 0)¶
RIGHT_DEG = 0¶
UP = (0, -1)¶
UP_DEG = 90¶
config.FPS = 60¶

Frame rate of the game.

config.GAME_TITLE = 'RPG Game'¶

Title of the game.

config.GRID_HEIGHT = 10¶

Amount of tiles in ‘y’ axis.

config.GRID_WIDTH = 15¶

Amount of tiles in ‘x’ axis.

config.SCREEN_HEIGHT = 640¶

Total screen height in pixels.

config.SCREEN_WIDTH = 960¶

Total screen width in pixels.

config.TILE_SIZE = 64¶

Size of one tile of a grid.

RPG Game
